summary: Lots of changes in this update! Default modules and settings have been updated, so please check the settings screen if something isn't the way you prefer. There are also a few new features, like "Gifts in Inbox", "Journal Progress Log Tracker", and beta version of "Rank-Up Forecaster" as well as an integrated Markethunt chart for Better Marketplace. There are also a ton of fixes, improvements, and optimizations across the board. Happy hunting!

details.title: Settings & Defaults
items: Settings screen has been redesigned to be more organized and easier to navigate
These settings are now on by default: Better Journal's "Loot as list" and "Loot icons", Better Tournaments' "Show localized times inline"

Several beta features are now normal settings — Better Marketplace "Quick sell" and "Price history charts", Better Journal "Full mice images (no border)", Better UI "Square profile pics", Better Gifts "Gift button opens gift selector", and "Real Base Stats"
Fixed an issue where Custom Background, Custom Camp Background, Custom Horn, Custom Shield, and Custom HUD previews did not show every available option
Location HUDs settings moved into their own section rather than being under the location list
There is now an "Update Game Data" link in Advanced Settings to update mouse, item, and other data without having to update the extension or clear all cached data

details.title: New Features
items: Added a new "Gifts in Inbox" feature that adds recently discovered MouseHunt gift links to a "Gift Links" tab in the inbox for easy claiming
Added a new "Journal Progress Log Tracker" feature that tracks when your next journal log summary is due and gives quick access to your past logs

details.title: Better Maps
items: Added an initial draft of Corsair Chaser map groups
Minor style updates and performance improvements.

details.title: Better Marketplace
items: Added a sortable "Value" column (owned × average price) and a total estimated value readout when browsing a category
Added a "Filter by trap" dropdown to the Skins category so you can narrow skins to a single base trap
Added quick "Undercut"/"Overbid" price links and +1/+10/+100 quantity buttons to the item listing view
Added a beta feature for a price history chart on the item view, powered by Markethunt data
Minor style updates and performance improvements.

details.title: Better Journal
items: More journal entries now link items and show icons
Updated the "Loot as list" feature to include more journal entries
Updated default settings to have "Loot as list" and "Loot icons" enabled

details.title: Location HUDs - Floating Islands
items: Added "Randomize" and "Randomize all" buttons when editing your airship
You can now hover over a part in the workshop to preview it on your airship, rather than having to click the Preview button
New beta feature: "Airship Randomizer" will randomize all your airship parts every new island

details.title: Location Dashboard
items: Added Conclusion Cliffs to the dashboard
Fixed cached location data being lost when the game reports empty quest data after leaving a location
Fixed an error when refreshing the dashboard while it's open

details.title: Paste Hunter ID
items: Added support for pasting a full "profile.php?snuid=" link to go directly to that hunter's profile

details.title: Other
items: Better Inventory: Reworked trap sorting with clearer sort indicators and new "LE/Non-LE" and "Special/Normal" filters
Better Quests: The mice named in M400 assignment objectives are now linked, with hover cards
New "Journal Progress Log Tracker" feature that tracks when your next journal log summary is due and gives quick access to your past logs
Added a "Hide Trap Selector Tooltips" setting to hide the trap selector item tooltips that can get stuck open and in the way on mobile
Scoreboard search on profiles now groups the scoreboards into sections in the dropdown
Location HUDs - Fort Rox: Added per-phase hunt counts to the night timeline, made the bait cheeses clickable to equip/unequip, and updated styles
Image Upscaling & Transparency: Fixed images not being re-upscaled when the game re-renders an entry back to its original image
Item dialogs now set the page URL to the item's permalink while open, so you can copy or share a link to the item
Bundled all icons, images, and map sorting data into the extension instead of loading them remotely, for faster and more reliable loading
Numbers are now formatted consistently across all modules
Miscellaneous UI improvements and bug fixes
